languages.text: "Священные машины аугментаций благословенны сами по себе", {n}ревниво ворчит {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g}.{/n} "Но данная комплектация встречается чуть реже прочих. При правильном уходе она может значительно увеличить скорость качественного реципиента".

traits.locale_text: "Священные машины аугментаций благословенны сами по себе", {n}ревниво ворчит {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g}.{/n} "Но данная комплектация встречается чуть реже прочих. При правильном уходе она может значительно увеличить скорость качественного реципиента".
traits.speaker: Augmentator

languages.text: "Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."
languages.original_text: "Священные машины аугментаций благословенны сами по себе", {n}ревниво ворчит {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g}.{/n} "Но данная комплектация встречается чуть реже прочих. При правильном уходе она может значительно увеличить скорость качественного реципиента".

traits.locale_text: "Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

"Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

"Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the Genetor jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase a recipient's speed."

"Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

"Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

languages.text: 「強化の聖なる機械は、それ自体が祝福されている」と、ジェネーターは嫉妬深くため息をつく。「しかし、このセットは他のものよりも少し希少です。適切なケアをすれば、受け取る人の速度を大幅に向上させることができます」
languages.original_text: "Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the Genetor jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase a recipient's speed."

traits.locale_text: 「強化の聖なる機械は、それ自体が祝福されている」と、ジェネーターは嫉妬深くため息をつく。「しかし、このセットは他のものよりも少し希少です。適切なケアをすれば、受け取る人の速度を大幅に向上させることができます。」

languages.text: "Kutsal ogmentasyon makineleri, kendi başlarına kutsanmıştır." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} kıskançlıkla homurdanıyor.{/n} "Fakat bu özel set, diğerlerinden biraz daha nadir. Uygun bakımla yüksek kaliteli bir alıcının hızını büyük ölçüde artırabilir."
languages.original_text: "Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal ogmentasyon makineleri, kendi başlarına kutsanmıştır." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} kıskançlıkla homurdanıyor.{/n} "Fakat bu özel set, diğerlerinden biraz daha nadir. Uygun bakımla yüksek kaliteli bir alıcının hızını büyük ölçüde artırabilir."

languages.text: «Todas las máquinas sagradas de aumento están benditas», {n}farfulla el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} con envidia.{/n} «Pero este conjunto en particular es más especial que otros. Con los cuidados adecuados, puede aumentar en gran medida la velocidad un portador de gran calidad».
languages.original_text: "Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

traits.locale_text: «Todas las máquinas sagradas de aumento están benditas», {n}farfulla el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} con envidia.{/n} «Pero este conjunto en particular es más especial que otros. Con los cuidados adecuados, puede aumentar en gran medida la velocidad un portador de gran calidad».

languages.text: “神圣的植入物机械都接受过祝福，”{n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}嫉妒地嘟囔道，{/n}“但这套植入物比其他的更为罕见。若保养得当，它能大幅提升高质量容器的速度。”
languages.original_text: "Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

traits.locale_text: “神圣的植入物机械都接受过祝福，”{n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}嫉妒地嘟囔道，{/n}“但这套植入物比其他的更为罕见。若保养得当，它能大幅提升高质量容器的速度。”

languages.text: « Les machines sacrées d'augmentation sont toutes bénies et précieuses, {n}marmonne jalousement le {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g},{/n} mais cet ensemble-ci est un peu plus rare que les autres. Entretenu comme il se doit, il peut considérablement accroître la vitesse d'un porteur de qualité. »
languages.original_text: "Sacred machines of augmentation are blessed in their own right," {n}grumbles the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} jealously.{/n} "But this particular set is slightly rarer than others. With proper care, it can greatly increase the speed of a high-quality recipient."

traits.locale_text: « Les machines sacrées d'augmentation sont toutes bénies et précieuses, {n}marmonne jalousement le {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g},{/n} mais cet ensemble-ci est un peu plus rare que les autres. Entretenu comme il se doit, il peut considérablement accroître la vitesse d'un porteur de qualité. »

languages.text: "Heilige Augmentationsmaschinen sind selbst gesegnet", {n}murrt der {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} eifersüchtig.{/n} "Aber dieses Set ist seltener als andere. Bei entsprechender Pflege kann es das Tempo eines hochwertigen Empfängers deutlich erhöhen."
